text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That should be everyone. Do you all have your
seat belts on?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good! We're ready to leave now, driver!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Was the card you picked... the ace of hearts?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It's not that hard. It's all just an illusion!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
D-dang, that's cool! Man, I wish I could do tricks
like that too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haha! If you'd like, I can teach you tonight.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, teach me too! I want to know too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Of course. You can all come over
tonight!
Fuji Kiseki's summer camp starts off blazing hot!
